title: Tetramicra rigida
taxonomy: Tetramicra rigida is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Leguminosae. This plant is a type of vine or climber native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Leguminosae family, also known as Fabaceae, is a large and diverse group of plants commonly referred to as legumes. Tetramicra rigida is further classified within the subfamily Faboideae, which comprises many species of flowering plants. The classification of Tetramicra rigida provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
uses: Tetramicra rigida is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
